label: Symbolic Order
description: The shared symbolic structure that organizes political identity and meaning.

label: Institutional Embodiment
description: The degree to which institutions carry and enforce the order.

label: Self-Preservation
description: The embodied order acts to preserve its continuity and authority.

label: Crisis / Sacralization
description: Crisis conditions intensify sacred claims around survival.

label: Correction Capacity
description: Pluralism, review, limits, dissent, memory, and institutional design restrain pathological escalation.
